name: oficina
description: Oficina marketplace — a lean agent harness of working patterns for AI-assisted development

plugins.name: oficina
plugins.description: House patterns: NestJS CRUD with DIP, multi-tenant Prisma schema conventions, RBAC design, ClickUp task breakdown and client-facing documentation. Includes /oficina:init to configure any project automatically and /oficina:review for house-checklist diff review.
